details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist (expected by governance contract; top-level board/ exists but reports/board/ is missing)
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing — governance contract requires both reports/audit/ and reports/board/

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference moltbot. scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py also references moltbot. Per governance spec, moltbot code in repo is an anomaly.
